overrides.prismjs: Fixes CVE-2024-53382 (DOM Clobbering). Required by @sanity/orderable-document-list → @sanity/ui → react-refractor → refractor → prismjs
overrides.glob: Fixes CVE-2025-64756 (command injection). Required by sanity → archiver/rimraf → glob
overrides.js-yaml: Fixes prototype pollution / quadratic DoS (GHSA-mh29-5h37-fv8m, GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68). Required by sanity → @sanity/cli → @vercel/frameworks → js-yaml
overrides.uuid: Fixes missing buffer bounds check (GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq). Required by sanity → @sanity/id-utils/@sanity/uuid/@sanity/cli → uuid
overrides.typeid-js: Pulls in vulnerable uuid transitively. Required by sanity → @sanity/telemetry / @sanity/cli → typeid-js
overrides.smol-toml: Fixes DoS via TOML comment parsing (GHSA-v3rj-xjv7-4jmq). Required by sanity → @sanity/cli → @vercel/frameworks → smol-toml
